subcodes.title: Words to Jinab-i-Hizari et al, spoken in Sept. 1913
subcodes.first_line: It was the beginning of summer when Mirza Aqa Khan beseeched the Blessed Beauty to grace Afjeh with His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول تابستان بود میرزا آقاخان استدعا کرد که جمال مبارک به افجه تشریف ببرند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
